---
title: "Hw 7"
author: "Jordan Sutherland"
date: "4/8/2022"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## 1a

```{r}
pchisq(10.91449,1,lower.tail=FALSE, log.p=FALSE)
```

## 1d

```{r}
binom.test(125,127,p=0.5,alternative="greater")
```

## 2

```{r}
library(gee)
library(survival)
library(psych)
```

```{r}
MS <- readRDS(url("https://ajmolstad.github.io/docs/MS.RDS"))
MS.table <- matrix(c(37,33,10,3,5,11,14,7,0,3,5,3,1,0,6,10),nrow=4,ncol=4)
```

## 2c

```{r}
cohen.kappa(MS.table)
```

## 2d

```{r}
MS$newRating <- 1*(MS$Rating == "1" | MS$Rating == "2")
modInd <- gee(newRating ~ Neurologist, id=patient, family=binomial, data=MS)
summary(modInd)
modC <- clogit(newRating ~ Neurologist + strata(patient), data=MS)
summary(modC)
```
